SOCRules.GeneralRules1: Secrets of Cleopatra is a 3 or more reels, 4-row video slot featuring Infinity Reels and increasing multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 0.10

SOCRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
SOCRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: On any spin, if the rightmost reel does not improve any winning combination and there is a Scatter symbol on the rightmost reel, then an extra reel is added to the right.
SOCRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination4: The added extra reel is spun, and if it again improves any winning combination, then another extra reel is added and so on.
SOCRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination5: Wins are calculated once no extra reel is added.
SOCRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination7: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet level.

SOCCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: At every spin starting with 3 reels, any combinations of 5 or more symbols (excluding Scatter symbol) from the leftmost reel will result in a winning combination.
SOCCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: On any spin, if the rightmost reel improves any winning combination, then an extra reel is added to the right.
SOCCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination6: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the "Paytable".
SOCCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
SOCCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on all reels except reel 1.

SOCMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
SOCMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
SOCMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: During any main game spin, the win multiplier increases by 1 for every extra reel added.
SOCMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination3: Wins are then multiplied by the win multiplier and paid once no extra reel is added.

SOCFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: Players may choose to start the Free Spins Feature with a multiplier increment of +1 for every extra reel added, or to gamble for higher multiplier increment (+2, +3 or +4).
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: Tap on the 'Gamble' button to gamble for a higher multiplier increment.
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination4: If the pointer of the wheel points to a green area after spinning, the gamble is successful and the multiplier increment value will be increased by 1. Otherwise the Free Spins Feature will end.
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination5: The Free Spins Feature will automatically start if the multiplier increment value reaches +4 during the gamble.
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination6: Tap on the 'Start' button to start the Free Spins Feature with the indicated multiplier increment value.
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination7: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
SOCFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination8: During any free spins, the win multiplier increases by the multiplier increment value (+1, +2, +3 or +4, depending on the result of the gamble) for every extra reel added.
